% figures/convergence.tex — empirical convergence-time CDF.
% Generated by scripts/convergence-cdf.py from
% data/aggregated/convergence-cdf.csv (exact Beta inverse-CDF LCB via
% scipy.stats.beta.ppf). Three curves: high-confidence production cells
% (advisor-decisions.jsonl), thin-evidence cells with flat Beta(1,1)
% priors, and thin-evidence cells with MOA-1b informative priors.
\begin{tikzpicture}
\begin{axis}[
    width=0.88\linewidth, height=5.5cm,
    xlabel={Dispatches before tier stabilisation},
    ylabel={Cumulative fraction of cells},
    xmin=0, xmax=90, ymin=-0.02, ymax=1.05,
    grid=major, grid style={dashed, gray!30},
    legend pos=south east, legend style={font=\scriptsize},
]
\addplot[blue, thick, const plot] coordinates {
    (0,1.0000)
    (81,1.0000)
};
\addplot[red, thick, dashed, const plot] coordinates {
    (0,0.4000)
    (19,0.6000)
    (20,0.7000)
    (22,0.8000)
    (65,0.9000)
    (81,1.0000)
};
\addplot[teal!70!black, thick, const plot] coordinates {
    (0,0.6000)
    (19,0.7000)
    (25,0.8000)
    (44,0.9000)
    (80,1.0000)
    (81,1.0000)
};
\legend{High-confidence (production), Thin-evidence (flat prior), Thin-evidence (MOA-1b prior)}
\end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
